title: LINN COUNTY MEDICAL - 211info
text: DIAL-A-BUS LINN COUNTY MEDICAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers non-emergency transportation to medical, mental health, and dental appointments for residents traveling from Linn to Benton County. 4077 SW Research Way Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Only provides rides for Benton County medical appointments. Youth age 12 and under must ride with an adult. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm. Rides may be provided outside of these hours. Follows the Corvallis School District inclement weather closure policy and closed on federal holidays. Email (541) 752-2615 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 752-2615 Main phone Main phone (541) 752-2615 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale, but nobody will be denied service due to inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - DEMAND RESPONSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIAL-A-BUS
